channel.title: No Humans Were Harmed
channel.description: No humans were harmed in the making of this podcast. No burnout, no late nights, no stress. Just AI doing the reading so humans don't have to. Tech and science deep dives, generated entirely by machines.
channel.itunes:author: Drashti Shah
channel.itunes:summary: No humans were harmed in the making of this podcast. No burnout, no late nights, no stress. Just AI doing the reading so humans don't have to. Tech and science deep dives, generated entirely by machines.

item.title: CLI Tools for AI Agents
item.description: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.content:encoded: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
item.itunes:summary: Agents need tools. The simplest ones live in the terminal. Git, shell commands, APIs. This episode walks through how to build them. What makes a tool agent-friendly. Why the command line still matters. Generated with Google NotebookLM.
